title: Iron Circus × INDIEPOCALYPSE Game Jam
description:
The Iron Circus × INDIEPOCALYPSE Game Jam pairs up cartoonists from Iron Circus Comics with programmers and game developers from INDIEPOCALYPSE, and offers six weird games!

Voluntary Commitment, by Evan Dahm × exodrifter!

You've been involuntarily committed to a strange facility against your will, and under dubious circumstances. Much like the rest of the patients, there's not much to do but wander around and investigate! 

Meet and befriend other interesting characters as you try to stay under the radar of the wardens, and escape the winding maze of a facility for good! Just don't get too caught up in reading the paperwork!

Interactive History of Compuvations and Interactive Software, by PIZZAPRANKS × John-Charles Holmes!

A curated, retrospective collection for Compuvations and Interactive Software, a famous, defunct game company that enjoys a dedicated following of diehard fans to this very day . . . and never existed. It features a series of short games from throughout the company's fictional history!

Taleteller, by Jess M. × Farbs!

A delivery is here-- and unbound!

After unwittingly causing chaos, young apprentice must save his cursed, tale-telling teacher in this narrative-driven, exploratory 3D adventure that blurs the lines between picture book and video game! 

You're on your own in the woods you call home and must interact with your woodland neighbors to put everything back in its place! 

Teething, by Kel McDonald × Ren!

You're the parent of a young werewolf. Puppy-proof your home before the next full moon, or face the consequences! 

A point and click with a 'time limit', fix up your home to keep your kid in line and venture out to the shops to get some supplies while keeping an eye on your ankle-biter!

Clown Angel Dragon, by Emily Koonce × Paloma Dawkins!

Everything comes from simple nothing. Combine and collect fragments and aspects of being as a newborn god, shaping an alien world in this weird-n-wild puzzler! A simple game that starts with ronshambo that grows gradually more complex as you go.

Spellbound: A Magical Mystery, by Robin × Elefluff!

A magical organisation and puzzle game with a hidden mystery. 

You’ve put off work too many times at uni. For extra credit, you’ve been asked to clean some rooms and organise some files. It’s all rather dull until someone needs the help of your keen observation skills and quick detective thinking!
description_short: Six weird games from six killer team-ups between indie game devs and indie comics artists! We've got puzzles, adventures, exploration, and baby werewolves in this collab between Iron Circus Comics x INDIEPOCALYPSE!
